name: Women's Shiny Plastic Rectangle Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses - Universal Thread™ Black: UV Protection, Scratch-Resistant
description:
Add glam appeal to your looks by accessorizing with the Shiny Plastic Rectangle Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses from Universal Thread™. These rectangle sunglasses feature a black frame with gray gradient lenses for an eye-catching look. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. Made of 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these black sunglasses fit medium faces.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
